videoSnippet.title: Architect of His Own Demise || Jorden vs Aravindh || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Van Foreest, Jorden (2705) - Aravindh, Chithambaram VR. (2700)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.03.05
B30 Sicilian defence

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Nc3 Nf6 4.Bb5 Qc7 5.Bxc6 dxc6 6.d4 cxd4 7.Qxd4 Bg4 8.Qe5 Qd6 9.Qg3 Bxf3 10.Qxf3 e5 11.O-O Be7 12.Ne2 Qe6 13.Ng3 g6 14.Qb3 Qxb3 15.axb3 Bc5 16.Bg5 Nd7 17.Rfd1 f6 18.Bd2 Ke7 19.Ne2 Rhd8 20.Nc1 Bd6 21.b4 f5 22.Nb3 Nf6 23.exf5 gxf5 24.Na5 Rd7 25.Nc4 Bc7 26.Re1 Ke6 27.Be3 e4 28.Bb6 Nd5 29.Bxc7 Rxc7 30.f3 Nxb4 31.Re2 b5 32.Na5 c5 33.fxe4 f4 34.Nb3 Rd8 35.c3 Nd3 36.Ra6+ Kf7 37.e5 Re7 38.e6+ Kf6 39.Nd2 Kf5 40.Nf3 Rd5 41.Rc6 Kf6 42.g4 fxg3 43.hxg3 a5 44.Kg2 a4 45.Ra6 b4 46.cxb4 cxb4 47.Rxa4 Rxe6 48.Rxe6+ Kxe6 49.g4 Rd7 50.b3 Kd5 51.Ra5+ Ke4 52.Kg3 Rb7 53.Rf5 Nc1 54.Rf4+ Ke3 55.Nd4 Kd3 56.Kh4 Rb6 57.Rf1 Na2 58.Rf4 Nc3 59.Nf3 Ke3 60.Rf5 Rh6+ 61.Kg3 Ne2+

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:30 Game starts!
14:00 IWITP
14:35 STANDINGS BEFORE FINAL ROUND!
17:00 Legends of the Channel!
